title: Tables in Dashboard Sort / Displays Incorrectly!
excerpt:
Hello, the Table widget shows the groups in the wrong order, which greatly limits their use. 
How do we sort the groups in tables?

posts.author: sakirose (sakirose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, the Table widget shows the groups in the wrong order, which greatly limits their use.

How do we sort the groups in tables?

posts.author: steve.escott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Support says that Dashboard tables can’t be sorted, and that it should be requested as a new feature.

Dear support: Please consider this as a new feature request.

posts.author: mic (Michael Righetti)
posts.cookedHtml: hey, where are you on this new feature request, i need it too
